mnemonics: M - Many shapes can be classified
C - Categorize objects based on patterns
S - Shapes can be combined to form classes
keyPoints: 1. Bird's Eye View: Imagine a 2D shape from above
2. Classify by Pattern: Look for shapes and lines
3. Label and Group: Group similar shapes together
4. Classify Accurately: Make sure you get it right
5. Combine Shapes: Combine shapes to form more complex shapes
